name: VA Benefits and Services Briefing
whatItProvides: Overview of VA health care, compensation, housing, and educational benefits available to separating, demobilizing, or retiring service members.

name: VA Benefits 101 Overview
whatItProvides: TAPevents course detailing VA education, home loans, life insurance, and memorial benefits.

name: VA Home Loan Guaranty Program
whatItProvides: Helps veterans, service members, and eligible surviving spouses become homeowners by guaranteeing a portion of the loan.

name: VA Health Care Enrollment
whatItProvides: Planning and application portal for medical care, prescription coverage, mental health services, and specialty care post-transition.

name: VA Disability Compensation (BDD)
whatItProvides: Filing claims for service-connected conditions under Benefits Delivery at Discharge (BDD) between 180 to 90 days before separating.

name: Vocational Rehabilitation & Employment (VR&E / Chapter 31)
whatItProvides: Employment training, accommodations, resumes, and job-seeking skills for veterans with service-connected disabilities and employment barriers.

name: GI Bill & Education Benefits
whatItProvides: Funding program for college degrees, vocational certificates, apprenticeships, flight training, and licensing exams.
